zh.lifeSummary: 當Conan de Aske於大約1140年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Roger de Aske32歲，母親Whitemal de Dalton22歲。他和Sibilla de Aslakby至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1201年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾易亞斯比阿斯可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Staffordshire): topographic name from northern Middle English ask ‘ash tree’ (Old Norse askr), or a habitational name from Aske (North Yorkshire). Compare Ash .

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

variants.name: Axe
meanings: English (West Yorkshire, Lincolnshire): variant of Aske with metathesis of /sk/ to /ks/, spelled with an x.

English (Dorset, Somerset): habitational name from Axe Farm in Chardstock (Devon, formerly in Dorset), itself named for the river Axe, which forms part of the south-eastern boundary of Chardstock parish.
Americanized form of German   Axt   or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Conan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Conan de Aske was born about 1140, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Aske, was 32 and his mother, Whitemal de Dalton, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sibilla de Aslakby. He died after 1201, in Aske, Easby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conan de Aske est né environ 1140, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Aske, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Whitemal de Dalton, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sibilla de Aslakby. Il est décédé après 1201, à Aske, Easby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conan de Aske um 1140 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Aske 32 und seine Mutter Whitemal de Dalton 22. Er hatte mit Sibilla de Aslakby mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1201 in Aske, Easby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sibilla de Aslakby. Morì dopo il 1201, nel Aske, Easby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Conan de Askeが約1140年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Roger de Askeは32歳，母Whitemal de Daltonは22歳であった。彼はSibilla de Aslakbyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1201年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエアスビーアスクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Conan de Aske(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Aske(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Whitemal de Dalton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Sibilla de Aslakby(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1201년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스비 아스크에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conan de Aske родился около 1140 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Aske было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Whitemal de Dalton, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sibilla de Aslakby. Он умер после 1201 г. в местности аск, эасби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
